_meta.warning: Customer names are public. Specific outcome metrics are sourced from Typewise's own PR; the salesperson should validate during discovery.

case_studies.headline: Multilingual EU retailer scales support without growing headcount
case_studies.use_case_summary: Brack.ch routes inbound DACH-language tickets through Typewise's agent assistant layer on top of Zendesk, with autonomous resolution on high-volume intents.

case_studies.headline: EU parcel network handles seasonal surge with AI co-pilot
case_studies.use_case_summary: DPD uses Typewise to absorb peak-season ticket spikes (where-is-my-parcel, delivery rescheduling) without proportional agent hiring.

case_studies.headline: Fortune 500 CPG standardizes consumer response quality across brands
case_studies.use_case_summary: Unilever deploys Typewise for consumer-care responses across brand portfolios, with tone guardrails per-brand.

case_studies.headline: Travel operator deflects pre-trip questions without losing booking momentum
case_studies.use_case_summary: TUI Cruises uses Typewise to answer pre-booking and pre-departure questions in real time, freeing live agents for booking conversion.

case_studies.headline: B2B vehicle manufacturer accelerates dealer + fleet support
case_studies.use_case_summary: IVECO uses Typewise to triage dealer and fleet-operator inquiries, including warranty and parts lookup.

case_studies.headline: Consumer-health device maker scales multilingual product support
case_studies.use_case_summary: Beurer uses Typewise for post-purchase device-support inquiries with consistent tone across DACH languages.

case_studies.headline: DACH online retailer maintains quality through 4-language scale
case_studies.use_case_summary: Galaxus handles broad product-category inbound across Switzerland's 4 language regions using Typewise.

case_studies.headline: B2B SaaS keeps premium-brand response quality at scale
case_studies.use_case_summary: Superhuman uses Typewise to maintain its on-brand response style across high-volume premium support.

case_studies.headline: EU energy utility deflects high-volume billing inquiries
case_studies.use_case_summary: Kelag uses Typewise for high-volume meter and billing queries in German.

case_studies.headline: Swiss freight operator unifies multilingual customer dispatch
case_studies.use_case_summary: Planzer uses Typewise for tracking and dispatch inquiries across all Swiss language regions.
